2606.20162.title: Implicit Semantic-Aware Communication Based on Hypergraph Reasoning
2606.20162.paper_summary: Semantic-aware communication has emerged as a transformative paradigm for next-generation communication systems, shifting the fundamental goal from transmitting bit-level symbols to reliably recovering and understanding the semantic meaning of information. Previous studies have demonstrated that representing the semantic content of source messages as graph-based structures can significantly improve communication efficiency and the accuracy of semantic inference at the receiver. However, existing solutions typically employ graphs that capture only pairwise relationships, thereby neglecting higher-order implicit correlations commonly observed in real-world scenarios, such as group interactions, multi-entity associations, and complex relational contexts. This limitation reduces semantic expressiveness and makes semantic inference susceptible to ambiguity and performance degradation, particularly under noisy or corrupted channel conditions. To address these issues, this paper proposes a novel hypergraph-based implicit semantic reasoning framework, HISR, which leverages hypergraphs to represent complex multi-entity relationships among semantic knowledge entities. In HISR, entities and their associated higher-order relations are mapped into dedicated semantic subspaces tailored to distinct relational contexts. This design not only disentangles diverse semantic interactions to mitigate the over-smoothing effects commonly found in traditional graph embedding methods but also enables robust semantic inference even when partial information loss occurs during transmission. Numerical results show that the proposed HISR achieves up to a 36.6% improvement in implicit semantic interpretation accuracy over the state-of-the-art benchmarks.
2606.20162.paper_summary_zh: 語義感知通信已成為下一代通信系統的一種變革性範式，將基本目標從傳輸位元級符號轉變為可靠地恢復和理解信息的語義意義。先前的研究已證明，將源消息的語義內容表示為基於圖的結構可以顯著提高通信效率和接收端的語義推斷準確性。然而，現有的解決方案通常僅使用捕捉成對關係的圖，從而忽略了在現實場景中常見的高階隱式相關性，例如群體互動、多實體關聯和複雜的關係上下文。這一限制降低了語義表達能力，使得語義推斷易受模糊性和性能下降的影響，特別是在噪聲或損壞的通道條件下。為了解決這些問題，本文提出了一種新穎的基於超圖的隱式語義推理框架HISR，該框架利用超圖來表示語義知識實體之間的複雜多實體關係。在HISR中，實體及其相關的高階關係被映射到專門為不同關係上下文量身定制的語義子空間中。這一設計不僅解開了多樣的語義互動，以減輕傳統圖嵌入方法中常見的過平滑效應，還使得即使在傳輸過程中發生部分信息損失時，也能實現穩健的語義推斷。數值結果顯示，所提出的HISR在隱式語義解釋準確性上比最先進的基準提高了最高達36.6%。
2606.20162.author: Yiwei Liao et.al.
2606.20162.authors: Yiwei Liao, Shurui Tu, Yong Xiao, Yingyu Li, Guangming Shi
